scope: English physical card_printings. Non-English/digital/unresolved rows are reported as blocked and excluded from image repair authority.

confidence_definitions.exact: Image is proven to match the selected printing, including finish/stamp/parallel when applicable.
confidence_definitions.representative: Image is safe for display at card identity level but is not exact child visual truth.
confidence_definitions.missing_variant_visual: Correct card display image is available, but exact finish/stamp/parallel visual is missing or unproven.
confidence_definitions.missing: No safe display image is available.
confidence_definitions.blocked: Image repair is blocked by scope, identity, or unproven image status.
